typography.h1_classes: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#FDFBF7]

layout.spacing_strategy: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for section vertical padding. Use p-8 or p-12 for internal card padding.
layout.alignment: Prioritize asymmetrical layouts and optical alignment. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing sections, overriding Shadcn defaults where necessary.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-sans font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#F3E5AB] transition-colors duration-300 tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/20 text-white font-sans font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-sm hover:bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md transition-colors duration-300 tracking-wide

cards.glass: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

visual_enhancers.texture: Apply a subtle grain/noise overlay across the entire site body to give it a physical, analog film feel.
visual_enhancers.hover_effects: Cinematic zoom: hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out on images. Sibling dimming on OTT cards.
visual_enhancers.motion: Use framer-motion for smooth, slow fade-ups on scroll. Elements should drift in slowly to emphasize luxury.

sections_and_media.name: Hero Section
sections_and_media.description: Fullscreen cinematic background, pure black gradient overlay at bottom to blend into next section.
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Overlay must be a gradient: bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/60 to-black. Center-aligned text for maximum cinematic impact. Display dual CTAs.

sections_and_media.name: Trust Badges
sections_and_media.description: Minimalist row of features/guarantees under hero.
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Use lucide-react icons. Text should be uppercase, tracking-widest, text-xs, text-zinc-500. Opacity 60% default, 100% on hover.

sections_and_media.name: Problem Section
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Stark contrast. Massive typography for pain points ('Hard drives die'). Asymmetrical alignment. Minimal to no imagery, focus on the painful truth.

sections_and_media.name: Features Grid
sections_and_media.description: Bento grid of 8 features (One Platform. Every Wedding Solution).
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Cards should use the glassmorphism style. Icons in soft gold. Use a mix of col-span-1 and col-span-2 for asymmetrical tension.

sections_and_media.name: How It Works
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Vertical line connecting steps or horizontal connected cards. Step numbers in large serif font (e.g., text-6xl text-white/5) overlapping the text.

sections_and_media.name: OTT Episodes Mockup
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Aspect ratio 16:9 for episode cards. Apply a Play button icon overlay on hover. Episode title in bottom left. Hover state should zoom the image and dim sibling cards.

sections_and_media.name: One-Click TV
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Image on right, text on left. Image should have a subtle gold glow or a 1px border-white/20 to separate it from the black background.

sections_and_media.name: Founding Photographers
sections_and_media.description: Exclusive 'Apply Now' form limited to 100 studios.
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Use Shadcn forms but highly customized: inputs should have bg-transparent, border-b border-white/20 only, rounded-none to look editorial and high-end.

sections_and_media.name: Pricing
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Tall rectangular cards. The 'Studio' card should be highlighted with a gold border and a subtle gold ambient shadow. Use pure HTML/Tailwind, avoid Shadcn Card if it restricts height/flexibility.

sections_and_media.name: Final CTA
sections_and_media.description: Stop delivering hard drives. Start delivering experiences.
sections_and_media.design_instructions: Centered alignment. Massive typography. Gold primary button. Ensure plenty of negative space (py-40).

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-demo').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient text-shadow or a gradient overlay behind it to pass WCAG AA standards.
